zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud de Morley於1369年出生在威爾士蒙姆爾拉格藍時，她的父親Sir John de Morley ,Knight25歲，母親Maud Barry verch Thomas26歲。她於1392年與Sir Thomas ap Guillem Herbert在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾拉格藍結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1438年7月4日在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾拉格藍享年69歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾拉格藍。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud de Morley于1369年出生在威尔士蒙姆爾拉格藍时，她的父亲Sir John de Morley ,Knight25岁，母亲Maud Barry verch Thomas26岁。她于1392年与Sir Thomas ap Guillem Herbert在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾拉格藍结婚。他们至少是11个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1438年7月4日在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾拉格藍享年69岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾拉格藍。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Morley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Morley (for example in Derbyshire, County Durham, Norfolk, and Yorkshire), or Moreleigh in Devon, all of which are named from Old English mōr ‘moor’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Irish (Mayo): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Murghaile ‘descendant of Murghal’, a personal name based on muir ‘sea’ + gal ‘valour’.
Irish (Mayo): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Murthuile ‘descendant of Murthuile’, a personal name derived from muir ‘sea’ + tuile ‘tide’.

variants.name: Marler
meanings: occupational name from Middle English marler, either ‘spreader of marl (as fertilizer)’ or ‘hewer or quarrier of marl’.
topographic name from Middle English marlere ‘marl-pit’ (Old French marliere).
in Norfolk, perhaps also a variant of   Morley  .

variants.name: Murley
meanings: Irish (Cork and Kerry): variant of   Morley  .

English (Cornwall and Somerset): habitational name from Murley in Uplowman (Devon). The placename derives from Old English mōr ‘moor’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. There may well have been some confusion with Morley .

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud de Morley was born in 1369, in Raglan, Monmouthshire, Wales, her father, Sir John de Morley ,Knight, was 25 and her mother, Maud Barry verch Thomas, was 26. She married Sir Thomas ap Guillem Herbert in 1392, in Raglan, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 4 July 1438, in Raglan, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 69, and was buried in Raglan, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud de Morley est née en 1369, à Raglan, Monmouthshire, Galles, son père, Sir John de Morley ,Knight, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Maud Barry verch Thomas, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas ap Guillem Herbert en 1392, à Raglan, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 juillet 1438, à Raglan, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Raglan, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud de Morley 1369 in Raglan, Monmouthshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Morley ,Knight 25 und ihre Mutter Maud Barry verch Thomas 26. Sie hat 1392 in Raglan, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom Sir Thomas ap Guillem Herbert geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 11 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. Juli 1438 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Raglan, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Raglan, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud de Morleyが1369年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアラグランで生まれた時，父Sir John de Morley ,Knightは25歳，母Maud Barry verch Thomasは26歳であった。1392年にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアラグランでSir Thomas ap Guillem Herbertと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも11人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1438年7月4日にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアラグランで69歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアラグランにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud de Morley(이)가 1369년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 라글런에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Morley ,Knight(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud Barry verch Thomas(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1392년 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 라글런에서 Sir Thomas ap Guillem Herbert(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1438년 7월 4일 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 라글런에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 라글런에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud de Morley родилась в 1369 г. в местности раглан, монмоутшир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Sir John de Morley ,Knight было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Barry verch Thomas, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas ap Guillem Herbert в 1392 г. в местности раглан, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 4 июля 1438 г. в местности раглан, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности раглан, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания.
